100089226.description: Filters allow data objects to specify test criteria which allows their use. Filters can be defined by a single object of type (Filter Test), an array of tests, collection groups, or a combination of these objects.

AND.description: Evaluates all tests in the group, all must pass in order for the group to pass.

NOT.description: Evaluates all tests in the group, all must fail in order for the group to pass.

OR.description: Evaluates tests in the group, one or more must pass in order for the group to pass.

all.description: Evaluates all tests in the group, all must pass in order for the group to pass.

all_of.description: Evaluates all tests in the group, all must pass in order for the group to pass.

any.description: Evaluates tests in the group, one or more must pass in order for the group to pass.

any_of.description: Evaluates tests in the group, one or more must pass in order for the group to pass.

none_of.description: Evaluates all tests in the group, all must fail in order for the group to pass.

100089226.title: Filter Group Map

domain.description: The domain the test should be performed in.

subject.description: The subject of this filter test.

test.description: The name of the test to apply.

value.description: The value being compared with the test.

2789112004.description: Filters allow data objects to specify test criteria which allows their use. Filters can be defined by a single object of type (Filter Test), an array of tests, collection groups, or a combination of these objects.

items.description: Filters allow data objects to specify test criteria which allows their use. Filters can be defined by a single object of type (Filter Test), an array of tests, collection groups, or a combination of these objects.

oneOf.description: Filters allow data objects to specify test criteria which allows their use. Filters can be defined by a single object of type (Filter Test), an array of tests, collection groups, or a combination of these objects.

2789112004.title: Filter Group

description: Allows an entity to jump around a target.

check_collision.description: Enables collision checks when calculating the jump. Setting check_collision to true may affect performance and should be used with care.

entity_bounding_box_scale.description: Scaling temporarily applied to the entity's AABB bounds when jumping. A smaller bounding box reduces the risk of collisions during the jump. When check_collision is true it also increases the chance of being able to jump when close to obstacles.

filters.description: Conditions that need to be met for the behavior to start.

jump_angles.description: The jump angles in float degrees that are allowed when performing the jump. The order in which the angles are chosen is randomized.

jump_cooldown_duration.description: The time in seconds to spend in cooldown before this goal can be used again.

jump_cooldown_when_hurt_duration.description: The time in seconds to spend in cooldown after being hurt before this goal can be used again.

landing_distance_from_target.description: The range deciding how close to and how far away from the target the landing position can be when jumping.

landing_position_spread_degrees.description: This angle (in degrees) is used for controlling the spread when picking a landing position behind the target. A zero spread angle means the landing position will be straight behind the target with no variance. A 90 degree spread angle means the landing position can be up to 45 degrees to the left and to the right of the position straight behind the target's view direction.

last_hurt_duration.description: If the entity was hurt within these last seconds, the jump_cooldown_when_hurt_duration will be used instead of jump_cooldown_duration.

line_of_sight_obstruction_height_ignore.description: If the entity's line of sight towards its target is obstructed by an obstacle with a height below this number, the obstacle will be ignored, and the goal will try to find a valid landing position.

max_jump_velocity.description: Maximum velocity a jump can be performed at.

prepare_jump_duration.description: The time in seconds to spend preparing for the jump.

required_vertical_space.description: The number of blocks above the entity's head that has to be air for this goal to be usable.

snap_to_surface_block_range.description: The number of blocks above and below from the jump target position that will be checked to find a surface to land on.

valid_distance_to_target.description: Target needs to be within this range for the jump to happen.

title: minecraft:behavior.jump_around_target
